textByHash.189ec61be7f9e81d8c69e2911c50ca7574ca655c: Ah! Exile! Begone with you, before you suffer the same fate as these fledglings!
textByHash.191d51d1ac6f0f2fccfb131312aee3ce364653e5: My sword arm grows weary, and the blood of my foes hangs heavy upon my clothing!
textByHash.244cfc3ac74fb5c61d83d7687059f6cc6efc77e4: I have nothing to spare, but my equipment grows weaker under the onslaught of the dagger-mouth spawns!
textByHash.2c7152d114825daddfb6b1b9b207613d75fca45f: I do not trust you outerlander, I will not accept your gifts, no matter what your intention...
textByHash.301984eb270c8b0a8dc5c1c384ec5f6341b0141e: Ah, this will serve me well as a backup! My thanks to you Dräpare, I trust we will one day sing songs together of glorious battles in the Rellekka longhall!
textByHash.313427e43ca440e5da1d52a88c47d69b4865511c: Perhaps I misjudged you, exile. Best of luck on your adventure.
textByHash.47a383b74f5a93d6834d427f4f1ee41b9f280033: I will trade you a finely cooked shark if you have a replacement for my helm, my shield or my blade...
textByHash.4a058c5ad6d975fc94e423ff0578840d9a00ccd0: These fledgelings won't drop anything you're looking for, though. Search the caves for some matured daggermouths.
textByHash.50995ed6201c4e853597ed298024d3ca1145dc64: You're lucky I'm busy exile! Things might have been different if I wasn't...
textByHash.51a7d86a99a918333be96a2f6f9c0361599a9ab1: As you wish, My weapons have lasted me this long, I will keep my trust in them yet.
textByHash.5ec7a99b5df0b0a34d44badfb0a97525dd76c80e: I train my skills upon its foul brood, to prepare myself for the fight ahead!
textByHash.6661743d42425afb49e7ae1728e63856273ce5d1: Ah, just what I was looking for! You wish to trade me that for a cooked shark?
textByHash.6b40fd4244107680649bef60775107fafed0dee6: Listen. I'm sorry about the way I acted while you were exiled. Bardur gets hostile around outerlanders.
textByHash.75e5d295f1896968bf08c1687bf643291126860f: You already have one! Begone, exile!
textByHash.779985d980186a513c319798905f4716c78053aa: Hmm... Well I suppose the money would be of great help to the families of the fallen. Very well, I will sell you a shield for 150,000 coins.
textByHash.8128ce3a3f10e1568f8d4b57d40c00a77588d7df: I have no interest in that... thing... you are trying to offload on me.
textByHash.82ce004bbbb0ab6ec40fc594dc0094667447d4ba: Ah! Outerlander! Do not interrupt me in my business! I must cull these fiends!
textByHash.85e84c577661cb4965d13a3c6c1f81d98e7ebdf6: I kill the daggermouths for glory and for sport! When I have had my fill, I move on to the daggermouths' lair!
textByHash.8bb437d8ac5cb4b4053a36af78e3a912ff74531b: Give me any equipment you wish to trade, and I will pay you a shark for it.
textByHash.909d8f67ff6518a99d2060261009f08293dbcf25: Hmm... They would indeed be pleased. Having your shield used to make the shield of a hero would be an honour!
textByHash.98d6222ff50b860f068708547b65869ff21cc41f: Aye, that I can ! Yonder lies the lair of the daggermouth kings, the three beasts of legend!
textByHash.9e1bd246bf380bf519d81329d1a4bcc46202fb36: The daggermouths found in these caves should drop a few when slain. They take them from fallen warriors. I have a few myself, in fact. I wish to give them back to the families of the fallen.
textByHash.9e6f9b0e2c7b51df8c467440b6b09ed51ca42194: I have been here all the long day, slaughtering the daggermouth spawns so that none may pass!
textByHash.a3f1450476d32b23ede58de0317f8d6136862368: No , I will trade you my finely cooked shark for a trusty Fremennik blade, a sturdy Fremennik helm, or a mighty Fremennik shield...
textByHash.a990c964dde65bd2756e7befd62f019e338e691e: Exile, has that shield served you well?
textByHash.c4e46f912b41b282d89165285bb7d256583c74c8: Ah, you did not come prepared ?
textByHash.cd192617eb2aaf95b94f3dcea696187ce5d5f728: Well I wouldn't expect an exile like you to care about the fallen. Be gone with you!
textByHash.d1b6f8960d993d9c596befd4090529bfef4b1ba6: Well you're not having another one if that's how you take care of things! If you want another, you'll need to slay some daggermouths!
textByHash.da366b2b6273b730b6ef93b9337936572ee90e93: As you wish, Dräpare My weapons have lasted me this long, I will keep my trust in them yet.
textByHash.e5416bb55c2e8ad2a2224beaa6f328470a5d946d: Only an outerlander would ask such a question! Is it not obvious what I am doing?
textByHash.e5a9b5e4391ab49a6d046afa0888af0b5e55be5c: I'm not too certain I should trust you! What is it you want?
textByHash.f7c70cf51716048f46e78c28676046c9d878e159: Ah, this will serve me well as a backup! My thanks to you , I trust we will one day sing songs together of glorious battles in the Rellekka longhall!
